text: قَالَ‌ أَ لَمْ‌ أَقُلْ‌ إِنَّکَ‌ لَنْ‌ تَسْتَطِيعَ‌ مَعِيَ‌ صَبْراً

en.ahmedali: "Did I not tell you," he replied, "that you will not be able to bear with me?"
en.ahmedraza: He said, “Did I not say that you will never be able to patiently stay with me?”
en.arberry: Said he, 'Did I not say that thou couldst never bear with me patiently?'
en.daryabadi: He said: said I not that thou wouldst not be able to have with me patience?
en.hilali: He (Khidr) said: "Did I not tell you, that you would not be able to have patience with me?"
en.itani: He said, “Did I not tell you that you will not be able to endure with me?”
en.maududi: He replied: "Did I not tell you that you will not be able to patiently bear with me?"
en.mubarakpuri: He said: "Did I not tell you, that you would not be able to have patience with me"
en.pickthall: He said: Did I not tell thee that thou couldst not bear with me?
en.qarai: He said, ‘Did I not say that you cannot have patience with me?’
en.qaribullah: 'Did I not I tell you' he replied, 'that you would not bear patiently with me'
en.sahih: [Al-Khidh r] said, "Did I not say that with me you would never be able to have patience?"
en.sarwar: He said, "Did I not tell you that you would not be able to remain patient with me?"
en.shakir: He said: Did I not say that you will not be able to have patience with me?
en.transliteration: Qala alam aqul innaka lan tastateeAAa maAAiya sabran
en.wahiduddin: He replied, "Did I not tell you that you would never be able to bear with me patiently?"
en.yusufali: He answered: "Did I not tell thee that thou canst have no patience with me?"
fa.ansarian: گفت: [ای موسی!] آیا نگفتم که تو هرگز نمی توانی بر همراهی من شکیبایی ورزی؟
fa.ayati: گفت: نگفتم كه تو را شكيب همراهى با من نيست؟
fa.bahrampour: گفت: آيا نگفتم كه تو هرگز نمى‌توانى همراه من شكيبايى كنى
fa.fooladvand: گفت: «آيا نگفتم كه تو هرگز نمى‌توانى همپاى من صبر كنى؟»
fa.ghomshei: گفت: آیا من نگفتم که هرگز ظرفیت و توانایی آنکه با من صبر کنی نداری؟
fa.khorramdel: (خضر) گفت: مگر نگفتم که تو هرگز نمی‌توانی همراه من شکیبائی‌کنی؟
fa.khorramshahi: [خضر] گفت مگر نگفتمت که تو همپای من صبر نتوانی کرد
fa.makarem: گفت: «آیا نگفتم تو هرگز نمی‌توانی با من شکیبایی کنی؟!»
fa.moezzi: گفت آیا نگفتم که تو نتوانی با من صبرکردن‌
fa.mojtabavi: گفت: نگفتم كه تو همراه من نتوانى شكيبايى كرد؟
fa.sadeqi: گفت: «آیا نگفتم تو هرگز نتوانی همپای من صبر کنی‌؟»
